title: Breathtaking Enchanted Autumn Forest Landscape At Golden
sourceTitle: Breathtaking Enchanted Autumn Forest Landscape At Golden
prompt: A breathtaking enchanted autumn forest landscape at golden hour, crystal-clear serene river flowing gently through the center, surrounded by vibrant fall foliage, tall white birch trees with black markings, lush orange-yellow autumn leaves glowing in warm sunlight, No text, no aritfacts --ar 4:3 --profile 9nv6snq 8hhmjfp eynj9qn f31jlp1 362c2i1 jk7jdw4 aapeo7t tkxiiz4 sf5lk2z dc6okxb 9j9citp nj4ajrt pz8oy84 yljbrjx w6z9nwr u1yscdb 2hwt1bg ufpt5t5 s5mpvm3 dbkgol8 t5cdf2v tmidqgp 6lf6sa2 yagbqan elwgxit 827b1ig 5uz2kfv z5cd14f 6pktpka llzup9v 892ua48 xtg2pxc mnxoi7i fey4r6j klxqom5 wsakreq --v 7
originalPrompt: A breathtaking enchanted autumn forest landscape at golden hour, crystal-clear serene river flowing gently through the center, surrounded by vibrant fall foliage, tall white birch trees with black markings, lush orange-yellow autumn leaves glowing in warm sunlight, No text, no aritfacts --ar 4:3 --profile 9nv6snq 8hhmjfp eynj9qn f31jlp1 362c2i1 jk7jdw4 aapeo7t tkxiiz4 sf5lk2z dc6okxb 9j9citp nj4ajrt pz8oy84 yljbrjx w6z9nwr u1yscdb 2hwt1bg ufpt5t5 s5mpvm3 dbkgol8 t5cdf2v tmidqgp 6lf6sa2 yagbqan elwgxit 827b1ig 5uz2kfv z5cd14f 6pktpka llzup9v 892ua48 xtg2pxc mnxoi7i fey4r6j klxqom5 wsakreq --v 7

promptTranslations.zh: 令人惊叹的迷人秋日森林风光，金色时刻，清澈宁静的河流缓缓流经中央，环绕着鲜艳的秋叶，矗立着斑驳黑纹的白桦树，高大挺拔，橙黄秋叶在温暖阳光中闪耀，无文字，无瑕疵。--ar 4:3 --profile 9nv6snq 8hhmjfp eynj9qn f31jlp1 362c2i1 jk7jdw4 aapeo7t tkxiiz4 sf5lk2z dc6okxb 9j9citp nj4ajrt pz8oy84 yljbrjx w6z9nwr u1yscdb 2hwt1bg ufpt5t5 s5mpvm3 dbkgol8 t5cdf2v tmidqgp 6lf6sa2 yagbqan elwgxit 827b1ig 5uz2kfv z5cd14f 6pktpka llzup9v 892ua48 xtg2pxc mnxoi7i fey4r6j klxqom5 wsakreq --v 7
promptTranslations.fr: Un paysage enchanteur d’une forêt d’automne à couper le souffle à l’heure dorée, une rivière cristalline et sereine coule doucement au centre, entourée d’un feuillage vibrant d’automne, hauts bouleaux blancs à marques noires, feuilles d’automne orange-jaune luxuriantes illuminées par la lumière chaude du soleil, sans texte, sans artefacts --ar 4:3 --profile 9nv6snq 8hhmjfp eynj9qn f31jlp1 362c2i1 jk7jdw4 aapeo7t tkxiiz4 sf5lk2z dc6okxb 9j9citp nj4ajrt pz8oy84 yljbrjx w6z9nwr u1yscdb 2hwt1bg ufpt5t5 s5mpvm3 dbkgol8 t5cdf2v tmidqgp 6lf6sa2 yagbqan elwgxit 827b1ig 5uz2kfv z5cd14f 6pktpka llzup9v 892ua48 xtg2pxc mnxoi7i fey4r6j klxqom5 wsakreq --v 7
promptTranslations.ru: Восхитительный зачарованный осенний лесной пейзаж в золотой час, кристально чистая спокойная река плавно течёт по центру, окружённая яркой осенней листвой, высокие белые берёзы с чёрными отметинами, пышные оранжево-жёлтые осенние листья светятся в тёплом солнечном свете, без текста, без артефактов --ar 4:3 --profile 9nv6snq 8hhmjfp eynj9qn f31jlp1 362c2i1 jk7jdw4 aapeo7t tkxiiz4 sf5lk2z dc6okxb 9j9citp nj4ajrt pz8oy84 yljbrjx w6z9nwr u1yscdb 2hwt1bg ufpt5t5 s5mpvm3 dbkgol8 t5cdf2v tmidqgp 6lf6sa2 yagbqan elwgxit 827b1ig 5uz2kfv z5cd14f 6pktpka llzup9v 892ua48 xtg2pxc mnxoi7i fey4r6j klxqom5 wsakreq --v 7
promptTranslations.pt: Uma paisagem deslumbrante de uma floresta encantada de outono na hora dourada, rio cristalino e sereno fluindo suavemente pelo centro, cercado por folhagem vibrante de outono, altos troncos de bétulas brancas com marcas pretas, folhas outonais exuberantes em tons de laranja-amarelo brilhando ao sol quente, sem texto, sem artefatos --ar 4:3 --profile 9nv6snq 8hhmjfp eynj9qn f31jlp1 362c2i1 jk7jdw4 aapeo7t tkxiiz4 sf5lk2z dc6okxb 9j9citp nj4ajrt pz8oy84 yljbrjx w6z9nwr u1yscdb 2hwt1bg ufpt5t5 s5mpvm3 dbkgol8 t5cdf2v tmidqgp 6lf6sa2 yagbqan elwgxit 827b1ig 5uz2kfv z5cd14f 6pktpka llzup9v 892ua48 xtg2pxc mnxoi7i fey4r6j klxqom5 wsakreq --v 7
promptTranslations.ja: 息を呑むような魔法の秋の森の風景、黄金の時間帯。透き通った穏やかな川が中心をゆったりと流れ、周囲は鮮やかな秋の紅葉、高く伸びる白樺の木には黒い模様、温かな日差しに照らされた豊かなオレンジや黄色の秋の葉。テキストなし、アーティファクトなし。--ar 4:3 --profile 9nv6snq 8hhmjfp eynj9qn f31jlp1 362c2i1 jk7jdw4 aapeo7t tkxiiz4 sf5lk2z dc6okxb 9j9citp nj4ajrt pz8oy84 yljbrjx w6z9nwr u1yscdb 2hwt1bg ufpt5t5 s5mpvm3 dbkgol8 t5cdf2v tmidqgp 6lf6sa2 yagbqan elwgxit 827b1ig 5uz2kfv z5cd14f 6pktpka llzup9v 892ua48 xtg2pxc mnxoi7i fey4r6j klxqom5 wsakreq --v 7
promptTranslations.ko: 황금 시간대의 황홀한 매혹적인 가을 숲 풍경, 중심을 부드럽게 흐르는 깨끗하고 평온한 강, 선명한 가을 단풍으로 둘러싸임, 검은 점이 있는 키 큰 흰 자작나무, 따뜻한 햇볕에 빛나는 풍성한 오렌지-노랑 가을잎, 텍스트 없음, 아티팩트 없음 --ar 4:3 --profile 9nv6snq 8hhmjfp eynj9qn f31jlp1 362c2i1 jk7jdw4 aapeo7t tkxiiz4 sf5lk2z dc6okxb 9j9citp nj4ajrt pz8oy84 yljbrjx w6z9nwr u1yscdb 2hwt1bg ufpt5t5 s5mpvm3 dbkgol8 t5cdf2v tmidqgp 6lf6sa2 yagbqan elwgxit 827b1ig 5uz2kfv z5cd14f 6pktpka llzup9v 892ua48 xtg2pxc mnxoi7i fey4r6j klxqom5 wsakreq --v 7
